case_for: If Winston were to unexpectedly enter the game as a starter or in relief and throw the ball frequently, his upside as a gunslinger could push him past 12 points, but nothing in the evidence suggests this is likely.
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of just 0.1 points and a recent run of extremely low fantasy outputs (all under 9 points, mostly near zero) indicate he is not in a starting or high-usage role, making it highly improbable he reaches 12 points.
